_comment: Single source of truth for ALL shared dependencies + tooling across Bayzat microapps. Apps ship with an empty dependency list and are hydrated from this file at chat-start (b0-worker), deploy (app-deployer), and CI. App-specific deps are added per app during the build. Everything lives under 'dependencies' so NODE_ENV=production builds do not prune build tooling. Edit a version here and every app picks it up on its next hydrate/deploy; pin exact to freeze.
